name: instagram-mcp
description: Instagram MCP Server - Access Instagram public data via imginn API

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search Instagram users by username or display name

query.description: Username or full name to search for

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Get detailed profile information of an Instagram user

tools.name: get_user_posts
tools.description: Get posts from a specific Instagram user with pagination support

cursor.description: Pagination cursor for loading more posts (optional)

tools.name: get_post_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Instagram post including images, videos, and engagement stats

post_shortcode.description: Instagram post shortcode extracted from the URL (e.g., DOZirOEEkZ6 from /p/DOZirOEEk6/)

tools.name: configure_proxy
tools.description: Configure proxy settings for accessing Instagram (required for first-time setup)

first_run.message: 首次使用需要配置代理才能访问Instagram服务

auto_prompt.when_no_proxy: 检测到未配置代理，请先使用 configure_proxy 工具配置代理服务器

workflow: 根据结果确认准确用户名
展示用户详细信息和统计数据
get_user_posts(_id=用户ID) 获取帖子列表
